description_long: This object consists of two rectangular stone blocks, one larger and one smaller, both with a rough, weathered surface texture. The larger block features a hinged lid that can be opened, revealing a hollow interior, while the smaller block appears solid and closed. The stone surfaces are mottled in shades of tan and brown, with visible signs of wear and some faint red markings on the side of the smaller block. The hinges and lid mechanism on the larger block are made of dark metal, contrasting with the stone. The blocks have straight, sharp edges and flat tops, making them suitable for use as barriers or obstacles in an urban environment. The overall appearance suggests durability and a utilitarian function, possibly as protective or storage elements.
description: Two rectangular, weathered stone blocks—one with a hinged lid and hollow interior, the other solid—featuring rough tan surfaces and faint red markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid of the larger block and the closed top of the smaller block, highlighting the hollow interior and hinge mechanism.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid sides of both blocks, with the lid of the larger block closed and the smaller block's surface uninterrupted.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the back and side of the blocks, with the open lid of the larger block visible from a different perspective.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear faces of both blocks, with faint red markings visible on the smaller block and the closed lid of the larger block.
attribute_installation_method: set in place on a level surface, possibly with minimal anchoring
attribute_weathering_pattern: Surfaces show moderate weathering with rough texture and some discoloration, suggesting exposure to the elements. No significant moss or erosion is visible.
attribute_presence_of_markings_or_engrav: Faint red markings are visible on the side of the smaller block, possibly graffiti or painted text.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: Isolated, but could be placed adjacent to other blocks or barriers.
